title: pellaea atropurpurea var. simplex
intro: Pellaea atropurpurea var. simplex, also known as the purple-leafed cliff brake, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Pellaea atropurpurea var. simplex is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared in various ways, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, from respiratory issues to skin problems. However, more research is needed to fully understand the potential health benefits and medicinal properties of Pellaea atropurpurea var. simplex.
